channel.title: Basketball Events & Tournaments on India's #1 Basketball Training Academy | IB Sports Academy
channel.description: Recent content in Basketball Events & Tournaments on India's #1 Basketball Training Academy | IB Sports Academy

item.title: Inter IB 4.0 • IB Sports Academy
item.description: The fourth edition of the Inter IB tournament brought together IB athletes for one of the most competitive in-house basketball events organized by IB Sports Academy.

item.title: Court to Championship • Coach Hassan El-Saddique
item.description: A high-energy USA-India collaboration featuring Hassan El-Saddique, focusing on pro-level skill development and motivational mentorship on the court.

item.title: Global Hoops Meet • Coach Malkom
item.description: An elite exchange of knowledge and passion as Coach Malkom (Uganda) brings African championship-level training to IB Sports Academy & Foundation athletes.

item.title: The Sunday Centre • Every Child, Every Dream
item.description: Our weekly Sunday Centre creates a safe, structured environment at ITL Public School where confidence and joy are built through inclusive basketball.

item.title:
Ranveer Singh Saini Inaugurates
Sunday Centre for Special Children
item.description: Special Olympian Ranveer Singh Saini joins Coach Ishwar Bhati to inaugurate a new era of inclusive basketball at ITL Public School, Dwarka.

item.title: Inter IB 3.0 • IB Sports Academy
item.description: The third edition of the Inter IB tournament brought together IB athletes for one of the most competitive in-house basketball events organized by IB Sports Academy.

item.title: Poetry of Movement • Aerobics Tournament
item.description: A celebration of rhythm and athleticism, featuring talented participants from across New Delhi at DIS Edge-18, showcasing high-energy performances.

item.title: Basketball Clinic • Naoufal Uariachi
item.description: FIBA Instructor and Morocco National Team Coach Naoufal Uariachi leads an elite clinic for New Delhi’s underserved youth.

item.title: Community Outreach • Basketball for Change
item.description: Under the ‘Rise Through Hoops’ initiative, we provide weekly basketball training and professional gear to the students of Don Bosco Ashalayam.
